author: shimengjie
description: Right-click selected text in the editor to apply color, font size, or bold from a configurable palette. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.description: Right-click selected text in the editor to apply color, font size, or bold from a configurable palette.
manifest.name: Text Brush

name: Text Brush

releases.author: callmekeyboardman
releases.description:
An Obsidian plugin that lets you quickly apply, switch, or clear text color and font size via the right-click context menu.

修复了一些 obsidian 对象问题。
